channel.title: ziangsfoodworkshop TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ziangsfoodworkshop

item.title: There are 3 things I’ve learnt from being in the @BBC News channel 1) I need to hit the gym harder, I look like a talking pumpkin 2) I need to know that 7 isn’t 8, I said 7 dishes but it’s it’s actually 8 as 8 sounds like wealth in Chinese and 3) to not b
item.description: There are 3 things I’ve learnt from being in the @BBC News channel 1) I need to hit the gym harder, I look like a talking pumpkin 2) I need to know that 7 isn’t 8, I said 7 dishes but it’s it’s actually 8 as 8 sounds like wealth in Chinese and 3) to not b

item.title: We have less than 30 of our 2nd cookbooks left in stock, it won’t be reprinted so don’t miss out #chinesefood #chef #recipe #ziangs #chinesetakeaway
item.description: We have less than 30 of our 2nd cookbooks left in stock, it won’t be reprinted so don’t miss out #chinesefood #chef #recipe #ziangs #chinesetakeaway

item.title: If you like chicken chow mein 🍗🍜 you have to try this recipe, I’m now uploading the full long form videos of the short versions I post on here, as some of you might find them useful! #recipe #noodles #cooking #chinesetakeaway #chowmein
item.description: If you like chicken chow mein 🍗🍜 you have to try this recipe, I’m now uploading the full long form videos of the short versions I post on here, as some of you might find them useful! #recipe #noodles #cooking #chinesetakeaway #chowmein

item.title: HELP!! Non UK peeps, where are you based? We need to know so we can start to organise international shipping! Even if you’ve bought before, just commenting where you are will help us loads! Thank you in advance!#foodies #chef #cooking #chinesetakeaway #zi
item.description: HELP!! Non UK peeps, where are you based? We need to know so we can start to organise international shipping! Even if you’ve bought before, just commenting where you are will help us loads! Thank you in advance!#foodies #chef #cooking #chinesetakeaway #zi

item.title: First cookbooks have now all been shipped out, and we’ve found we had less than 100 left, this will be gone by the end of the weekend, so don’t miss out as this is the last time this Chinese takeaway cookbook will be available. The second cookbook we will
item.description: First cookbooks have now all been shipped out, and we’ve found we had less than 100 left, this will be gone by the end of the weekend, so don’t miss out as this is the last time this Chinese takeaway cookbook will be available. The second cookbook we will

item.title: Paid Promotion: The @LuckyBoatNoodles noodles are back in stock, was saying 7th of April at one point but now all back to normal, so you can go and make chow mein at home now! 🍜 #foodies #chef #cooking #chinesetakeaway #chowmein
item.description: Paid Promotion: The @LuckyBoatNoodles noodles are back in stock, was saying 7th of April at one point but now all back to normal, so you can go and make chow mein at home now! 🍜 #foodies #chef #cooking #chinesetakeaway #chowmein

item.title: Paid Promotion: If you like Chinese chicken satay skewers then you have to check this recipe out! Today we’re working with @Jimmy's Sate to bring you this quick and fast version of the Chinese takeaway classic! We’ve used jimmy’s for decades now and still
item.description: Paid Promotion: If you like Chinese chicken satay skewers then you have to check this recipe out! Today we’re working with @Jimmy's Sate to bring you this quick and fast version of the Chinese takeaway classic! We’ve used jimmy’s for decades now and still

item.title: Not even announced yet and we’re the Best Selling Chinese Cookery Book! 📕🔥😊 Our new cookbook is called “The Ultimate Chinese Takeaway Bible” and is now available to pre order! If you're in the US or Australia, then the book will be out in January next yea
item.description: Not even announced yet and we’re the Best Selling Chinese Cookery Book! 📕🔥😊 Our new cookbook is called “The Ultimate Chinese Takeaway Bible” and is now available to pre order! If you're in the US or Australia, then the book will be out in January next yea

item.title: If you like rice noodles, you have to try this recipe for beef chow fun, just like a Chinese takeaway or takeout will make it! #recipe #cooking #chef #chowfun #chinesetakeaway
item.description: If you like rice noodles, you have to try this recipe for beef chow fun, just like a Chinese takeaway or takeout will make it! #recipe #cooking #chef #chowfun #chinesetakeaway

item.title: If you like Chinese takeaway chicken curry 🍛🍗 then you have to try this recipe! This is more the Morden take on the curry and many places will be buying the paste in, so if you’re local does an epic curry, it’s probably been homemade, so support them if y
item.description: If you like Chinese takeaway chicken curry 🍛🍗 then you have to try this recipe! This is more the Morden take on the curry and many places will be buying the paste in, so if you’re local does an epic curry, it’s probably been homemade, so support them if y

item.title: If you like orange chicken you have to try this Chinese takeaway orange chicken recipe out, it’s so good and hits so hard 🍊🐓 this can be found in my new cookbook, which is on pre order right now #recipe #cooking #chicken #chinesetakeaway #orangechicken
item.description: If you like orange chicken you have to try this Chinese takeaway orange chicken recipe out, it’s so good and hits so hard 🍊🐓 this can be found in my new cookbook, which is on pre order right now #recipe #cooking #chicken #chinesetakeaway #orangechicken

item.title: If you like noodles then you have to try this recipe for Chinese takeaway fried soft noodles, aka plain chow mein 🥢🍜 I’ve used this recipe is so many takeouts because it’s simple and hits hard 😊 not been paid for this one or been given the noodles, I’ve m
item.description: If you like noodles then you have to try this recipe for Chinese takeaway fried soft noodles, aka plain chow mein 🥢🍜 I’ve used this recipe is so many takeouts because it’s simple and hits hard 😊 not been paid for this one or been given the noodles, I’ve m

item.title: If you like Chinese takeaway fried rice then you have to try this recipe 🍗🍳🍚 This is for takeout version remember that, Chinese takeaway isn’t the same as traditional cooking, yes add garlic, ginger etc if you want, if your trying to recreate that takeawa
item.description: If you like Chinese takeaway fried rice then you have to try this recipe 🍗🍳🍚 This is for takeout version remember that, Chinese takeaway isn’t the same as traditional cooking, yes add garlic, ginger etc if you want, if your trying to recreate that takeawa

item.title: Paid promotion: If you like fried rice you have to try this Cantonese sticky fried rice aka Lo Mai Fan. My recipe for this fried rice dish is more of my take on it, stuff where I am is impossible to source like the traditional ingredients, such as, Chines
item.description: Paid promotion: If you like fried rice you have to try this Cantonese sticky fried rice aka Lo Mai Fan. My recipe for this fried rice dish is more of my take on it, stuff where I am is impossible to source like the traditional ingredients, such as, Chines

item.title: Super proud and taken back, because as two people from little old Minehead have a cookbook that’s not even released until 24th September this year is currently number one best seller in Chinese Food and Drink and also weirdly Meat and Poultry? But who’s c
item.description: Super proud and taken back, because as two people from little old Minehead have a cookbook that’s not even released until 24th September this year is currently number one best seller in Chinese Food and Drink and also weirdly Meat and Poultry? But who’s c

item.title: Paid Promotion: Thank you @KnowMSG! for this gift! (Wasn’t paid marked but marked it as paid as was gifted it) what a nice little care package! Make sure you guys follow @knowmsg! as they post really interesting and unknown facts, recipes and more about M
item.description: Paid Promotion: Thank you @KnowMSG! for this gift! (Wasn’t paid marked but marked it as paid as was gifted it) what a nice little care package! Make sure you guys follow @knowmsg! as they post really interesting and unknown facts, recipes and more about M

item.title: If you like chicken in black bean sauce then you have to try this recipe, it’s one I’ve used in many takeaways I’ve cooked in so as always, it’s legit 😊 hope you enjoy! #cooking #chef #chinesefood #chinesetakeaway #chinesecooking
item.description: If you like chicken in black bean sauce then you have to try this recipe, it’s one I’ve used in many takeaways I’ve cooked in so as always, it’s legit 😊 hope you enjoy! #cooking #chef #chinesefood #chinesetakeaway #chinesecooking

item.title: Yesterday we spent the day at The Social Kitchen Studios (which was mind blowing, so mush cool stuff to look at!) to talk some photos of us for our new cookbook “The Ultimate Chinese Takeaway Bible” what an experience it was! My face hurt so much from lau
item.description: Yesterday we spent the day at The Social Kitchen Studios (which was mind blowing, so mush cool stuff to look at!) to talk some photos of us for our new cookbook “The Ultimate Chinese Takeaway Bible” what an experience it was! My face hurt so much from lau

item.title: Paid Promotion: If you like plain chow mein then here is a quick recipe for you to try, I was just looking for an excuse to try out this new outdoor wok burner and thought plain chow mein is one of the best tests for a wok burner 🥢🍜 thank you @LuckyBoatNo
item.description: Paid Promotion: If you like plain chow mein then here is a quick recipe for you to try, I was just looking for an excuse to try out this new outdoor wok burner and thought plain chow mein is one of the best tests for a wok burner 🥢🍜 thank you @LuckyBoatNo

item.title: Cannot believe our debut cookbook has made it to the coming soon banner for Waterstones which is huge, not even close to publishing yet which again is massive! Thank you for support, you've been amazing, keep this up and we could be on the Telivised Visua
item.description: Cannot believe our debut cookbook has made it to the coming soon banner for Waterstones which is huge, not even close to publishing yet which again is massive! Thank you for support, you've been amazing, keep this up and we could be on the Telivised Visua

item.title: If you like egg rolls then you have to try this recipe, we don’t really get egg rolls in UK Chinese takeaways, but there well worth a try, these are very similar to our string rolls, in fact they’re pretty much the same, but hand made instead of using bou
item.description: If you like egg rolls then you have to try this recipe, we don’t really get egg rolls in UK Chinese takeaways, but there well worth a try, these are very similar to our string rolls, in fact they’re pretty much the same, but hand made instead of using bou

item.title: Paid promotion: If you like your chicken chow mein with the thinner noodles, then I got you covered with this Chinese takeaway chicken chow mein recipes 🥢🍜🍗, that I have infact used in takeouts before, so it’s legit 😊 and thank you @LuckyBoatNoodles for w
item.description: Paid promotion: If you like your chicken chow mein with the thinner noodles, then I got you covered with this Chinese takeaway chicken chow mein recipes 🥢🍜🍗, that I have infact used in takeouts before, so it’s legit 😊 and thank you @LuckyBoatNoodles for w

item.title: If you like crispy chicken then you have to try this crispy smoked chilli chicken recipe 🍗🔥 #foodtok #easyrecipe #homecooking #chickenrecipe #smokedchicken
item.description: If you like crispy chicken then you have to try this crispy smoked chilli chicken recipe 🍗🔥 #foodtok #easyrecipe #homecooking #chickenrecipe #smokedchicken

item.title: Back teaching Chinese takeaway cookery @School of Wok this July! Book fast as they sold out in 24hours of going on sell last time 😊 #foodtok #cookery #chinesetakeaway #homecooking #easyrecipes
item.description: Back teaching Chinese takeaway cookery @School of Wok this July! Book fast as they sold out in 24hours of going on sell last time 😊 #foodtok #cookery #chinesetakeaway #homecooking #easyrecipes

item.title: Here is a easy Char Sui pork belly recipe. One that is used in a few Chinese takeaways, it’s easy to make and store for later use! Remember if you can and have the means, to support your local takeaways and takeouts, helping small local businesses stay af
item.description: Here is a easy Char Sui pork belly recipe. One that is used in a few Chinese takeaways, it’s easy to make and store for later use! Remember if you can and have the means, to support your local takeaways and takeouts, helping small local businesses stay af

item.title: Paid Promotion: Here is a recipe for Chinese takeaway special fried rice, also known as yung, young and yum chow fried rice, how ever you say it, it’s all the same 😊🥢🥡🍚 remember to support your local takeaway if you can, supporting a small Local business
item.description: Paid Promotion: Here is a recipe for Chinese takeaway special fried rice, also known as yung, young and yum chow fried rice, how ever you say it, it’s all the same 😊🥢🥡🍚 remember to support your local takeaway if you can, supporting a small Local business

item.title: We have a whole new loads of products on our website, if you like the free content make sure to check it out and it’s free shipping on all orders over £45! Www.ziangs.com or click link in bio link tree. Also if you’d like videos on how to use the products
item.description: We have a whole new loads of products on our website, if you like the free content make sure to check it out and it’s free shipping on all orders over £45! Www.ziangs.com or click link in bio link tree. Also if you’d like videos on how to use the products

item.title: Here is how to use the kind of paste Thai takeouts and Chinese takeaways will use, it’s a super easy and tasty recipe for a chicken Thai green curry 🍗🌶️🔥, this is my own version, not may takeaways will make it like this, but you can make this as simple or
item.description: Here is how to use the kind of paste Thai takeouts and Chinese takeaways will use, it’s a super easy and tasty recipe for a chicken Thai green curry 🍗🌶️🔥, this is my own version, not may takeaways will make it like this, but you can make this as simple or

item.title: Replying to @🦄LindsayG🦄 If you want to learn more about MSG and just gleating well in general follow Cara, Ive tagged her channel, she has loads of experience in dealing with these kind of comments and here videos are very informative, unlike mine where I
item.description: Replying to @🦄LindsayG🦄 If you want to learn more about MSG and just gleating well in general follow Cara, Ive tagged her channel, she has loads of experience in dealing with these kind of comments and here videos are very informative, unlike mine where I

item.title: Replying to @mark what is MSG is a question I get asked a lot, I’ve made this video a few times, but thought I make it again as there are so many more people following now. Please take my humor as tongue in cheek, because if you don’t know it’s not bad fo
item.description: Replying to @mark what is MSG is a question I get asked a lot, I’ve made this video a few times, but thought I make it again as there are so many more people following now. Please take my humor as tongue in cheek, because if you don’t know it’s not bad fo
